overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a waterfront shanty town during golden hour. The player passes NPCs relaxing on outdoor furniture, ascends a large staircase, and explores an upper parking area with abandoned vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront dirt path with stilt houses

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront dirt path toward a stilt house with a futuristic city skyline visible in the background

entered.detail: weathered wooden house elevated on concrete pillars with external staircase
tall futuristic skyscraper with illuminated signage and geometric architecture dominating the skyline
scattered palm trees lining the waterfront path
calm waterway running parallel to the dirt path
discarded red upholstered sofas arranged in an outdoor living room setup

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a waterfront shanty town path during golden hour, with warm sunlight illuminating a stilt house on the right and a massive corporate tower visible in the distant city center. The camera moves forward along the dirt trail, approaching an outdoor lounge area with red couches visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor living room under stilt house

events.description: entering the shaded area beneath the stilt house where NPCs are gathered around a television

agents.ego_description: passing by the group of NPCs relaxing on red couches and watching television in the outdoor lounge area

notable_agents.action: sitting on red couch watching television with another person
sitting on separate red couch facing the television

entered.detail: television set placed on a wooden pallet displaying colorful animated content
external metal staircase attached to the stilt house leading to upper level

segments.scene_description: Moving under the stilt house into a shaded communal area, the camera passes NPCs lounging on discarded red couches watching a television. The space feels like an outdoor living room tucked beneath the elevated structure, with metal stairs visible leading up to the house entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded path between stilt houses with dense vegetation

events.description: turning left to pass group of standing NPCs and approach the concrete staircase

agents.ego_description: navigating past standing NPCs in the shaded corridor between buildings while heading toward the staircase

notable_agents.action: crouching down near a concrete barrier examining something on the ground
standing with arms crossed near palm tree

entered.detail: long concrete staircase with metal railings ascending to the highway overpass level
curved concrete retaining wall lining the dirt path

segments.scene_description: Leaving the outdoor lounge behind, the camera moves through a narrow shaded corridor between stilt houses with dense palm vegetation. The path curves past NPCs standing near a concrete embankment, with the large concrete staircase becoming visible ahead as the destination.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete staircase ascending to highway overpass level

events.description: beginning ascent of the long concrete staircase toward the upper level
reaching the top of the stairs and emerging into the open parking lot area

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs while looking up at the massive corporate towers and highway overpass above

entered.detail: elevated concrete highway structure casting shadows over the staircase

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the long concrete staircase, moving from the shaded lower level toward the sunlit upper area. The highway overpass looms overhead while the massive corporate tower becomes more prominent in the background, backlit by the setting sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated parking lot with abandoned vehicles

events.description: discovering a dead body lying on the asphalt among abandoned vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking through the abandoned parking lot examining the derelict vehicles and discovering a body on the ground

entered.detail: derelict motorcycles and scooters scattered across the asphalt
rusted and abandoned vehicles parked near the railing
orange and white striped barriers blocking off sections of the lot
deceased person lying face down on the asphalt wearing casual clothing

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto an elevated asphalt parking lot, the scene opens up to full sky exposure with the sun low on the horizon. The area contains abandoned vehicles, construction barriers, and debris. The camera approaches a dead body lying on the ground near the center of the lot, with the massive corporate tower still visible in the distant skyline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shaded waterfront shanty town up toward a desolate, sun-drenched elevated parking lot. It begins on a dirt trail during golden hour, moving past a stilt house toward an outdoor lounge where NPCs relax on red couches beneath the elevated structure. As the camera leaves the lounge, it winds through a narrow, shaded corridor flanked by palm vegetation and concrete embankments before turning toward a massive concrete staircase. The scene then shifts from the shadows of the lower level to the bright light of the upper area as the camera ascends the stairs under a looming highway overpass. Finally, the view opens up onto an asphalt lot filled with abandoned vehicles and debris, ending near a body on the ground with a massive corporate tower silhouetted against the low horizon.
